runtime_policy: repo-only fixture tests; launches only Python child processes for guard CLI coverage; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows
guard_policy: proves the visible battle input harness keeps explicit approval, fatal CDB log detection, post-g gating, and incremental log scanning before any future manual run
tests: visible battle harness guard accepts a source-safe harness with explicit runtime approval
visible battle harness guard rejects missing fatal CDB breakpoint patterns
visible battle harness guard rejects missing post-g break-instruction gating
visible battle harness guard rejects non-incremental CDB log scans
visible battle harness guard CLI writes outputs and fails closed under --require-pass
